title: alsine tenuifolia var. lydia
intro: Alsine tenuifolia var. lydia, also known as Lydia's gentian or lydia's stitchwort, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Alsine tenuifolia var. lydia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
